title: Bayou Blues
body: [![Abnormals Core](https://bit.ly/mcacorebadge)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/abnormals-core) [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/440256241932173323?label=&color=898324&labelColor=76B92C&logo=Discord&logoColor=898324&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/VzXSCFp) [![Twitter Follow](https://img.shields.io/twitter/follow/teamauroramods?label=&color=898324&labelColor=76B92C&logo=Twitter&logoColor=898324&style=for-the-badge)](https://twitter.com/teamauroramods) [![All Features](https://img.shields.io/badge/-features-898324?style=for-the-badge)](https://docs.google.com/document/d/e/2PACX-1vTexG0qtaEV07dYhwysGSL5lGiA01-YHRBXtCCmkOdzNdmVs9U3SGraN27hvX0TOBD8lcsy6IQCwJts/pub) [![Fabric Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/-Fabric%20Version-898324?style=for-the-badge)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/bayou-blues-fabric) ![divider](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/699373761455194162/816055655974699048/bayou_blues.png) A swampy new Bayou biome! Bayou Blues adds the Bayou, a new biome inspired by the swamps of Florida! It's full of foliage such as cypress trees, beard moss, algae, and gooseberries. It also adds Lily Flowers that can grow on Lily Pads. **Compatible with:** - [Quark](https://modrinth.com/mod/quark) - Cypress woodset compat, Algae Thatch Vertical Slab, and Gooseberry Sacks - [Buzzier Bees](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/buzzier-bees) - Cypress Beehive - [Environmental](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/environmental) - Bayou Slabfish & Lily Flower generation in Blossom Woods **Full feature list can be found [here](https://docs.google.com/document/d/e/2PACX-1vTexG0qtaEV07dYhwysGSL5lGiA01-YHRBXtCCmkOdzNdmVs9U3SGraN27hvX0TOBD8lcsy6IQCwJts/pub)** ![divider](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/699373761455194162/816055655974699048/bayou_blues.png) [](https://nodecraft.com/r/aurora)
